proof: let w0: X satisfy { action_bijection[G, X](a, G.1).map(w0) != identity_bijection(anchor).map(w0) }
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { identity_bijection[T0](x0).map(x1) = lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x1) }[X](anchor, w0)

goal: compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g), action_bijection[G, X](a, h)).map = compose[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map, action_bijection[G, X](a, h).map)
action_bijection[G, X](a, g * h).map = compose[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map, action_bijection[G, X](a, h).map)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g), action_bijection[G, X](a, h)).map = action_bijection[G, X](a, g * h).map
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse), action_bijection[G, X](a, g)) = action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse * g)
action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse * g) = action_bijection[G, X](a, G.1)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse), action_bijection[G, X](a, g)) = identity_bijection(anchor)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g), action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse)) = action_bijection[G, X](a, g * g.inverse)

proof: function[T0: Group](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 }[G](g)

goal: action_bijection[G, X](a, g * g.inverse) = action_bijection[G, X](a, G.1)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g), action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse)) = identity_bijection(anchor)
